official_name: Noisy speech database for training speech enhancement algorithms (Valentini / VoiceBank-DEMAND)
attribution_text: Valentini-Botinhao (2017), University of Edinburgh DataShare, CC BY 4.0, handle 10283/2791
vocal_type: speech (28+2 speakers), paired clean/noisy at known SNRs
allowed_eval_use: noise-gate/denoise calibration with clean references (speech caveat recorded)
notes: Speech, not singing: thresholds tuned here must be re-verified on singing (validation plan §1).
